who: logistics managers at freight companies processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For logistics managers at freight companies processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause delayed payments. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and shipping manifests.
problem: Inaccurate freight invoices lead to discrepancies and delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
